title: Marketing Coordinator
description: Raytheon is seeking a Marketing Coordinator to support our Nashville facility's corporate communications and marketing initiatives. You will manage marketing campaigns, organize events, create promotional materials, and coordinate with internal stakeholders to amplify our employer brand and business communications. This role requires meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational capabilities.
responsibilities: Develop and execute marketing campaigns for recruitment and corporate initiatives
Coordinate with graphic designers and vendors for promotional materials
Manage event planning and logistics for recruitment fairs and open houses
Maintain marketing calendar and track campaign metrics
Prepare marketing reports and analysis for management review
Support social media content creation and employee engagement initiatives

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits
